sections.paragraph:
(from the root צַהַר to shine, compare זָהָב No. 2), m.

(1) oil, especially fresh and new, Num 18:12 Deu 12:17 14:23 2Ki 18:32. It is often joined with תִּירֹושׁ must, and it appears to differ from שֶׁמֶן, as תִּירֹושׁ does from יַיִן. בְּנֵי הַיִּצְהָר sons of oil, i.e. anointed ones, Zec 4:14. Hence denom. הִצְהִיר [see צָהַר ].

(2) [Izhar], pr.n. of a son of Kohath, Exo 6:18 Num 3:19. Patron. ends in ־ִי, Num 3:27.

[יָצוּעַ subst. see יָצַע part. Paül.]
